In Parliament

  • Tweet

Caroline frequently holds the Government to account by speaking in debates, asking questions of Ministers, and tabling Written Questions to Government departments.

You can read Caroline's recent speeches and appearances in Parliament below:

Funerals: Regulation | Ministry of Justice | Written Answers

To ask the Secretary of State for Justice, whether his Department is responsible for reforming the regulation of funeral directors.
